name: Long Call
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: Simple long option. Maximum loss = initial premium. Undefined upside.

name: Long Put
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: Simple long option. Used defensively or as insurance on long stock.

name: Short Call (Naked)
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → no long shares to cover
notes: Unlimited risk. Guard checks countLongShares(). Will block unless 100 shares held per contract.

name: Short Put (Cash-Secured)
guard_reason: SELL put → cash-secured, defined risk
notes: Collateral requirement = strike × 100 per contract. Guard treats as always safe because margin/cash covers assignment.

name: Short Stock (Naked)
guard_reason: SELL stock without sufficient long shares held → no shares to short
notes: Guard checks countLongShares(). Will block if order.quantity > held shares.

name: Bull Call Spread
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → covered by long leg
notes: Vertical spread. Short call is covered by long call at lower strike.

name: Bear Call Spread
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → covered by long leg
notes: Short call covered by long call at lower strike. Hedged short call.

name: Bull Put Spread
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → covered by long leg
notes: Short put hedged by long put at lower strike. Defined risk.

name: Bear Put Spread
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → covered by long leg
notes: Long put hedges short put at lower strike. Defined risk.

name: Covered Call
guard_reason: Short call fully covered by long stock at ≥100 shares per contract
notes: Requires stock shares ≥ short call contracts × 100. Guard checks countLongShares() and countExistingShortCalls(). ib_sync detects via _merge_covered_call_groups().

name: Married Put (Protective Put)
guard_reason: BUY put → always allowed
notes: All-long structure. Downside protected. Max loss = premium paid.

name: Collar (Zero-Cost Collar)
guard_reason: Combo: long stock + long put + short call. Short call hedged by long put.
notes: Defined risk on both sides. Call is covered by stock + long put hedge. Structured for zero cost typically.

name: Long Straddle
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: All-long structure. Profits from large move in either direction. Requires volatility expansion.

name: Short Straddle
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → no long shares to cover
notes: Undefined risk both directions. Short call not covered by stock. Guard blocks on short call check.

name: Long Strangle
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: All-long structure. Cheaper than straddle but requires larger move. Max loss = premium paid.

name: Short Strangle
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → no long shares to cover
notes: Undefined risk both directions. Cheaper margin than straddle, but guard blocks due to naked call.

name: Long Call Butterfly
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → short calls covered by long calls
notes: 4-leg structure. Two short calls in middle covered by long calls at extremes. Max profit at middle strike.

name: Iron Butterfly
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → defined risk from hedges
notes: 4-leg spread. Combines bull put + bear call. Short put covered by long put, short call covered by long call.

name: Long Put Butterfly
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → covered by long puts
notes: 4-leg structure. Two short puts covered by long puts at extremes.

name: Long Iron Condor
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → defined risk
notes: 4-leg spread. Wide collars. Short put covered by long put, short call covered by long call.

name: Long Call Ratio Spread
guard_reason: Ratio: 1 long call vs 2 short calls. Short call not fully covered.
notes: Ratio spreads have undefined risk. Short call quantity exceeds long call coverage (1 long covers only 1 short).

name: Long Put Ratio Spread
guard_reason: Ratio: 1 long put vs 2 short puts. Ratio creates undefined risk.
notes: Ratio spreads expose extra short put(s) beyond the long hedge. Undefined risk below lower strike.

name: Short Call Ratio Backspread
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → naked short call
notes: 2 long calls do not cover 1 short call at lower strike. Naked short call exposure.

name: Short Put Ratio Backspread
guard_reason: SELL put → cash-secured, defined risk
notes: Guard allows all SELL puts. However, this ratio backspread has undefined risk above the short strike if assigned (2 long puts don't fully hedge short put assignment).

name: Synthetic Long Stock
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs; SELL put is cash-secured
notes: Synthetically equivalent to long stock. Risk profile = undefined (short put's assignment can exceed premium from long call if stock drops). Guard allows because both legs → covered.

name: Synthetic Short Stock
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → no long shares to cover
notes: Synthetically equivalent to short stock. Guard blocks due to naked short call (long put does not cover short call).

name: Long Risk Reversal
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs; SELL put is cash-secured
guard_gap: CRITICAL GAP: Risk reversal (bullish) has unlimited loss on the short put side if underlying crashes. However, guard allows because it detects both BUY and SELL legs. The short put creates undefined risk that is NOT offset by a long call at a different strike. Guard logic is insufficient for asymmetric risk reversal.
notes: ib_sync correctly detects as 'Risk Reversal (undefined risk)' but nakedShortGuard.ts allows it. Guard should either: (1) Block, (2) Require stock collateral for the short put, or (3) Explicitly model the short put assignment liability.

name: Short Risk Reversal
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → no long shares to cover
notes: Guard blocks due to naked short call (long put does not cover short call).

name: Diagonal Call Spread
max_loss: debit paid if defined, or unlimited if not
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → covered by long leg
notes: Horizontal spread with different expirations. Short call expires sooner. If structured as long call covers short call, guard allows (BUY + SELL). Risk depends on strike relationship and expiry roll.

name: Diagonal Put Spread
max_loss: debit paid if defined, or unlimited if not
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Horizontal spread (puts). Short put expires sooner; long put is hedge.

name: Calendar Call Spread (Same Strike)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → short call at same strike covered by long call at same strike
notes: Pure time decay play. Both legs at same strike, different expirations. Short call is hedged 1:1 by long call.

name: Calendar Put Spread (Same Strike)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Time decay play. Short put hedged by long put at same strike.

name: Jade Lizard
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → hedges present
guard_gap: CRITICAL GAP: Jade Lizard is defined-gap (no stock), and involves SELL call + SELL put. While guard detects BUY + SELL, it does not verify that the BUY legs are sufficient to cover the SELL legs at ALL price levels. A Jade Lizard with wide SELL strikes may create naked exposure if underlying breaks the long call or long put strikes.
notes: Advanced 4-leg structure. Guard allows due to both BUY and SELL present, but risk depends on strike widths and assignment scenarios.

name: Broken Wing Butterfly
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Modified butterfly with uneven wings. Two short calls in middle are covered by long calls at extremes.

name: Double Calendar Spread
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: 3-leg calendar. Long call covers 2 short calls at nearer expirations.

name: Skip Strike Butterfly
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Butterfly with wider strike gaps. Two short calls spaced $10 apart, covered by long calls at $100 and $130.

name: Christmas Tree (Vertical)
guard_reason: Multiple short calls; only 1 long call → naked short calls above the long call strike
notes: 3-wide short call position partially hedged by 1 long call. Naked exposure on extra short calls.

name: All-Long Combo (3+ legs, no shorts)
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: ib_sync detects: 'all(l['position'] > 0 for l in opt_legs) and not stk_legs' → 'Long Combo (N legs), defined'. Guard allows per BUY rule.

name: Ratio Call Spread (1x2 Short focused)
guard_reason: 1 long call vs 2 short calls. Extra short call is naked (not covered).
notes: ib_sync detects as 'Ratio Bull Call Spread (undefined)'. Guard blocks because countExistingShortCalls()+1 > floor(shares/100) when shares=0.

name: Call Spread (Standard 1x1)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → short call covered by long call
notes: Standard vertical. 1:1 ratio. Guard allows.

name: Long Stock (no options)
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: Equity position only. Guard allows because action='BUY'.

name: Covered Put (Stock + Long Put)
guard_reason: BUY anything → always allowed
notes: Stock + long put. All-long, defined risk on downside. Guard allows per BUY rule.

name: Partially Covered Call (Excess Short Calls)
guard_reason: 2 short calls vs 1x100 shares. Only 1 call is covered.
notes: Over-sold calls. Guard checks: existingShortCalls + order.quantity > floor(shares/100). Will block if selling the 2nd call.

name: Long Call Spread (Debit)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Vertical spread, debit paid upfront. Short call limited upside.

name: Short Call Spread (Credit)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → short call covered by long call
notes: Vertical spread, credit received. Short call hedged by long call.

name: Long Put Spread (Debit)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Vertical spread, debit paid. Short put hedged by long put.

name: Short Put Spread (Credit)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → short put hedged by long put
notes: Vertical spread, credit received. Short put covered by long put.

name: Box Spread (Synthetic Future)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → all hedged
notes: 4-leg synthetic future position. Locked-in risk/reward = strike width - net cost. Guard allows due to balanced BUY/SELL.

name: Reverse Conversion
max_gain: credit from short call - premium for put
max_loss: debit for stock - credit from call + premium for put
guard_reason: Stock + short call (covered by stock) + long put. Combo with BUY and SELL.
notes: Arbitrage structure. Long stock covers short call. Guard allows due to stock coverage.

name: Conversion (Arbitrage)
max_gain: credit from short put - cost of call
max_loss: debit for short stock + cost of call - credit for put
guard_reason: SELL stock without sufficient long shares → naked short stock
notes: Arbitrage structure. Guard blocks on short stock check (countLongShares()=0).

name: Ratio Put Spread (1x2 Long focused)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Ratio with long bias (2 long puts, 1 short put). Guard allows due to BUY + SELL, but this is actually defined-risk if the long puts fully cover the short put.

name: Seagull Spread
guard_reason: Combo with BUY call + SELL call + SELL put. BUY and SELL present.
guard_gap: CRITICAL GAP: Seagull has a short put with no hedge. The short call is covered by the long call, but the short put is naked. Guard allows because it detects both BUY and SELL, but does not verify that each SELL leg has a corresponding BUY leg of sufficient width.
notes: 3-leg structure. Long call at highest strike covers short call at middle strike. Short put at lowest strike is unhedged and exposes to assignment below the short strike.

name: Iron Albatross
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs → defined risk
notes: Ultra-wide condor. Short put covered by long put, short call covered by long call.

name: Call Debit Spread (Bullish)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Standard debit spread. Short call covered by long call.

name: Put Debit Spread (Bearish)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Standard debit spread. Short put covered by long put.

name: Call Credit Spread (Bearish)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Standard credit spread. Short call covered by long call.

name: Put Credit Spread (Bullish)
guard_reason: Combo with both BUY and SELL legs
notes: Standard credit spread. Short put covered by long put.

name: Naked Strangle (Short 1xN Strangle)
guard_reason: SELL call without stock coverage → no long shares
notes: Naked short call + extra short put. Guard blocks on short call check.
